title: fraxinus angustifolia var. oligophylla
intro: Fraxinus angustifolia var. oligophylla, also known as the narrow-leaved ash, is a variety of the European ash tree that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus angustifolia var. oligophylla include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and skin regeneration. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
